document.source_title: IPL 2026: Allen rediscovers game, revives KKR’s hopes

claims.claim_text: Finn Allen's recent performance has revitalized KKR's season.
claims.evidence_text: Allen’s last three scores—100, 18 and 93—tell a story bigger than form.

entities.name: Finn Allen
entities.description: A cricketer for Kolkata Knight Riders who has recently improved his performance.
entities.evidence_text: Finn Allen entered the IPL coming off a run to the T20 World Cup final with New Zealand.

entities.name: Kolkata Knight Riders
entities.description: A franchise cricket team in the Indian Premier League.
entities.evidence_text: For Kolkata Knight Riders, a side that had spent the better part of two seasons searching for sustained aggression at the top.

events.evidence_text: Allen starred in KKR’s 29-run win against Gujarat Titans with a 35-ball 93.

metrics.name: Runs Scored
metrics.evidence_text: To score 211 runs off just 90 balls isn’t just quick, it’s transformative.

relationships.subject: Finn Allen
relationships.evidence_text: Allen’s resurgence has restored balance to KKR’s batting and calm to their dressing room.

citations.title: IPL 2026: Allen rediscovers game, revives KKR’s hopes

source_credibility.reason: The source is a recognized news outlet covering sports.
